faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Rockville Centre?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Rockville Centre typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and provide detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Rockville Centre homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Rockville Centre take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or 2-3 hours for chemical application. Heat treatments often require only one visit, while chemical treatments may need follow-up applications 10-14 days later to eliminate newly hatched eggs.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Rockville Centre?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our certified technicians. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. For chemical treatments, we use EPA-approved products and provide clear instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure your family's and pets' safety.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee bed bug elimination in Rockville Centre?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments in Rockville Centre. If bed bugs return within the warranty period (typically 30-90 days depending on treatment type), we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. We also include follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination.
